---
title: "Community composition"
author: "Nitin Bayal"
format: html
editor: visual
execute:
  echo: true
---

## Introduction

This document reports on a microbiota project results of community composition across different diets and visits.

```{r data-load, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=FALSE}
# tse <- readRDS("../data/tse.Rds")
source("data.R")
```

## Data Summary

```{r data-summary, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
tse
```

## Community composition at the phyla level

```{r community-composition-phyla, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.height= 9, fig.width= 20, echo=FALSE}
# Load required libraries
library(miaViz)

# Getting top taxa on a Phylum level
top_phyla <- getTop(altExp(tse, "phylum"), top = 4, assay.type = "relabundance")

# Renaming the "Phylum" rank to keep only top taxa and the rest to "Other"
phylum_renamed <- lapply(rowData(altExp(tse, "phylum"))$phylum, function(x) {
    if (x %in% top_phyla) { x } else { "Other" }
})
rowData(altExp(tse, "phylum"))$phylum_sub <- as.character(phylum_renamed)

# Agglomerate the data based on specified phyla
tse_phylum <- agglomerateByVariable(altExp(tse, "phylum"), by = "rows", f = "phylum_sub")

# Visualization - composition bar plot
plotAbundance(
  tse_phylum,
  assay.type = "relabundance",
  color_by = "phylum_sub", group = "phylum", order.row.by = "abund"
) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, hjust = 1))
```

## Community composition at the genus level

```{r community-composition-genus, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.height= 9, fig.width= 20, echo=FALSE}
# Load required libraries
library(miaViz)
# Getting top taxa on a Genus level
top_genera <- getTop(altExp(tse, "genus"), top = 10, assay.type = "relabundance")

# Renaming the "Genus" rank to keep only top taxa and the rest to "Other"
genus_renamed <- lapply(rowData(altExp(tse, "genus"))$genus, function(x) {
    if (x %in% top_genera) { x } else { "Other" }
})
rowData(altExp(tse, "genus"))$genus_sub <- as.character(genus_renamed)

# Agglomerate the data based on specified taxa
tse_genus <- agglomerateByVariable(altExp(tse, "genus"), by = "rows", f = "genus_sub")

# Visualization - composition bar plot
plotAbundance(
  tse_genus,
  assay.type = "relabundance",
  color_by = "genus_sub", group = "genus", order.row.by = "abund") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, hjust = 1))
```
